title: Girl Sitting Behind Transparent Crystal Chessboard Knocking
sourceTitle: Girl Sitting Behind Transparent Crystal Chessboard Knocking
prompt: Girl sitting behind a transparent crystal chessboard, knocking the King of her opponent with her Queen and wins it after checkmate. Only a few chess pieces are left on the chessboard. Cinematic portrait, extreme close up shot, low angle, full frontal, dutch angle. Wearing a white bride's gown. Bokeh on background objects. Focused stage lighting. Focused and cool look. Slightly parted lips. Consistent chess piece size and chess piece colours of her and her opponent's. She is playing with white pieces against her opponent's black pieces. Emphasize the falling of the King chess piece.
